General.Name: Star Fashion Culture Holdings Limited
General.Description: Star Fashion Culture Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides content marketing solutions services in the People's Republic of China. The company offers marketing campaign planning and execution, including event design, logistics, layout of events, materials preparation, actual event set-up and implementation; offline advertising services; and online precision marketing services. It serves consumer goods, advertising and marketing, and media industries. Star Fashion Culture Holdings Limited was founded in 2015 and is based in Xiamen, the People's Republic of China.
